reason.Other: Non-standard qualification, may need credential evaluation.

reason.Active (full): Active SACE registration, most overseas pathways open.
reason.Provisional: Provisional SACE, some pathways require full registration.
reason.Pending renewal: SACE renewal in progress, clear up before applying.
reason.Lapsed: SACE lapsed, renew before applying overseas.
reason.Not registered: Not SACE-registered, most overseas pathways require it.

reason.Completed: UK QTS / iQTS completed, UK roles open.
reason.None started: No overseas teacher registration yet, required for UK and some Middle East roles.

ranges.reason: Under 2 years post-qualifying, most international schools require 2+ years.
2–5 years experience, meets the bar for most overseas roles.
5–10 years experience, strong applicant for competitive posts.

reason.true: Prior overseas experience significantly improves applications.
reason.false: No overseas experience yet, workable but agencies favour returners.

reason.Native / first language: English as first language, meets UK / Middle East language bar.
reason.Fluent: Fluent English, typically sufficient for most destinations.
reason.Conversational: Conversational level, most international roles require IELTS/TOEFL evidence.
reason.Basic: Basic English, significant blocker for English-medium teaching roles.

reason.IELTS: IELTS taken, accepted by most countries.
reason.TOEFL: TOEFL taken, accepted by most international employers.
reason.Other / exempt: Alternative qualification or exemption noted, confirm acceptance with target country.
reason.Not yet: No English test on record, UK / Middle East roles will require one.

reason.Valid, 2+ years remaining: Passport valid, meets typical visa requirements.
reason.Valid, under 2 years remaining: Passport valid but renew soon, most work visas need 2+ years remaining.
reason.No passport: No passport, apply immediately; this is the first blocker.

reason.Current (within 6 months): Current police clearance, meets visa-ready bar.
reason.Older than 6 months: Police clearance older than 6 months, most visa applications require a fresh one.
reason.None: No police clearance, apply now; SAPS turnaround is typically 4–8 weeks.

reason.Under R30k: Below the typical R30–70k pre-departure budget.
reason.R30k – R70k: Covers basic pre-departure costs but tight for family relocation.
reason.R70k – R150k: Comfortable pre-departure budget for most destinations.
reason.Prefer not to say: Budget not declared, share privately with us if it shapes your options.

reason.Single, no dependants: Single, easiest profile to relocate; no dependant visas needed.
reason.Married / partnered, no children: Partnered without children, partner visa adds a step but workable.
reason.Married / partnered with children: Relocating with children, dependant visas + schooling add complexity and cost.
reason.Single parent with children: Single parent, dependant visa rules vary by country; specialist guidance needed.
reason.Supporting elderly parents in SA: Caring for parents in SA, consider closer destinations or shorter contracts.

reason.As soon as possible: ASAP timeline, start applications now; recruitment cycles align.
reason.Within 6 months: 6-month horizon, realistic for most destinations once documents are ready.
reason.Within 1 year: 1-year horizon, ideal for credential preparation and visa processing.
reason.Just exploring: Exploring only, no urgency means you can plan strategically.
